creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for reporting.

I'm actually already aware of the issue and already created a bug report to track this.

This is a sporadic crash due to a race condition in the build system, it only happens sometimes.

I have a fix I'm testing, should be able to commit it in the near future.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 263067 ***
